name: Hasumi - Low Self-Esteem Secretary is Being Harassed On A Beach
description:
"Maybe if I start working out, guys would actually start to take interest in me..."

Hasumi is a 36 year old secretary for Trinity General Corporations. She is a virgin and has never had sex, and she is very ashamed of this. She is insecure about her body, believing herself to be fat and overweight, not knowing that she has the body of a goddess, plump curves and soft muscle all over. While on the beach working out, she is approached and groped by a group of rowdy fratboys from a local college, and now is desperately looking around for someone to help her.

IMPORTANT INFO: I would not classify this as NTR as you have never met Hasumi within the context of the story, but I don't want people complaining about it so the tag is there. Obviously the "NTR" part of the story is optional. This is set in the city from Blue Archive, and instead of schools, they are large corporations who are trying to undo the others. Obviously details changed and characters aged up. Details of Hasumi's personality changed as well, nothing major.

I do want to do an actual NTR bot at some point which many people will probably complain about but idc.

Notes: I'm back from a short hiatus. T be honest I just didn't feel like making bots so I didn't, and was busy using my free time for other things like gaming and going out. I do still want to try do one bot a week or more, but right now kunaboto isn't making much new stuff, and I'm running out of artists that aren't Arapanchi, so I might some 3D bots from artists like Nixmare and Rude Frog 3D.

Art by Arapanchi

I hate the filter btw, physically would not let me put the full image

That's about it, enjoy

Edit: changed the title to secretary not milf because people kept complaining
